     the Fermi energy is    -0.3107 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.99033075 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.8E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14941315 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.84091760 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -220287.63467394 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111173.62970161 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.85336873 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103030.99916252 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98173907 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.12 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.30 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  40 iterations
